title: Search: /api/search via ripgrep (grep fallback) + UI
description:
Add GET /api/search?q=<query> that shells out to ripgrep over repo-wiki/ (fallback to grep -r if rg absent), returning JSON matches { path, line, snippet }. Sanitize/escape the query; cap results. Client: a search box that shows results linking into pages.

Touches server + app.js (shared) -> depends on T2.

Test:
- seed a page containing 'billing'; curl '/api/search?q=billing' returns the match with path+snippet
- empty/over-long query handled gracefully (no shell injection; query passed as argv, not via shell=True)
acceptance_criteria: Search returns filesystem matches with path+snippet; query is passed safely (no shell injection); UI lists results
closed_reason: Completed: /api/search via ripgrep (grep fallback), argv/shell=False (injection-safe), query+result caps, search box UI toggling tree/results.
